1958 Burger Yacht Restoration

The Purpose

A 65-foot piece of American maritime history, brought back to life — because some things are worth preserving.

Support Our Journey Our Story

About the Purpose

A boat, a dream, a reason

I found this 65-foot, 1958 Burger Yacht and knew immediately — she was not meant to be forgotten. I bought her for $70,000 with one promise to myself: restore every inch of her to her original glory and keep her on the water where she belongs.

She will never be sold. She will never be scrapped. She will be loved back to life.

I named her The Purpose — because I believe everything and everyone has one. Including this boat.

65Feet of history
1958Year built
100%Never for sale

Future vision: open The Purpose as a one-of-a-kind floating Airbnb — where guests step aboard and travel back in time to 1958.

Then & Now

This is what she once was.
This is what she will be again.

This photograph shows her on the water in her original glory — proud, powerful, and alive. My mission is to bring her back to exactly this. Every plank, every fitting, every detail — restored to 1958 perfection.

Support the Mission

Help keep the Purpose afloat

Restoring a 65-foot yacht is no small undertaking. Every contribution — no matter the size — helps preserve a piece of history and gets us one step closer to the water.

We're raising funds through GoFundMe. Every dollar goes directly toward materials, labor, and the restoration work needed to bring this beautiful vessel back to life.
